name: Chicken Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the marinade ingredients.
2. Place in a glass bowl or dish that will hold chicken in a single layer.
3. Add chicken; let marinate for a minimum of 4 hours, turning occasionally.
4. May be left in fridge, covered overnight.
5. Remove chicken from marinade.
6. Grill chicken on barbecue, basting with marinade at intervals, or bake for 30 to 45 minutes in an oven set to 350 F until cooked through.
